Title: Rock Story
Actors: Vladimir Brichta, Alinne Moraes, Nathalia Dill
Plot: Gui is a former rock star who struggles to reinvent himself in his professional and personal lives after another artist steals his fame--and his wife. Imperfect, careless, but with a giant heart, he will be tested by fate while having the opportunity to change his life by finding out about a teenage son and facing an unexpected new love affair. But to change his own life story, he must make the right choices he did not make in the past.
